overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing a walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city at dusk. The player follows a pedestrian with a white umbrella along wet sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and continues beneath elevated highway structures with neon-lit skyscrapers visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: heavy rain visible falling from the edge of the overpass structure
group of pedestrians including a child pass close to the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind a person holding a white umbrella, maintaining consistent distance while navigating past oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with white umbrella walking ahead of camera at steady pace
child in colorful jacket walking alongside adult

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with rain dripping from the edge creating a curtain of water
thick cylindrical pillar supporting the highway above
dark futuristic building with red accent lighting and illuminated signage
rain-slicked pedestrian walkway reflecting the ambient city lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete highway overpass during a heavy downpour. The camera follows a pedestrian with a white umbrella while navigating past oncoming foot traffic. Rain drips from the overpass edge creating a water curtain, and the wet sidewalk reflects the mixed natural and artificial lighting of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered walkway and stepping onto the open street crosswalk
waiting at the traffic light then proceeding to cross the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wet intersection, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk while avoiding vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with transparent umbrella and yellow coat walking past camera
black SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall industrial pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
wet black asphalt with white crosswalk markings and lane dividers
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the sheltered overpass to an open intersection exposed to the heavy rain. The camera crosses the multi-lane asphalt road, navigating around vehicles and pedestrians. A person with a distinctive transparent umbrella passes by, and the distant skyline of neon-lit skyscrapers becomes visible through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk beneath elevated transit lines with distant city views

events.description: passing under overhead traffic signal gantry with speed limit signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rain-soaked sidewalk with fewer pedestrians around, maintaining view of the white umbrella figure ahead

notable_agents.action: person with white umbrella walking further ahead in the distance

entered.detail: metal framework of overhead highway or rail line with vertical support beams
digital road sign displaying speed limit 40
series of illuminated yellow chevron signs on road barrier
large architectural bridge structure spanning the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long walk along the open sidewalk with the elevated transit structure running parallel on the right. The crowd has thinned to sparse, and the white umbrella figure continues ahead in the distance. The camera passes traffic signage and arrow markers while the futuristic cityscape with its neon billboards and distant arch bridge remains visible through the persistent rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered depths of a concrete overpass into the wide, rain-drenched expanse of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins beneath a massive highway structure where the camera follows a pedestrian with a white umbrella through a curtain of dripping rain and reflective sidewalks. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens from the shelter of the overpass into a busy, exposed intersection, crossing multi-lane asphalt amidst vehicles and pedestrians with transparent umbrellas. The view then expands to reveal a distant skyline of glowing skyscrapers before shifting toward a long, open sidewalk flanked by an elevated transit structure. Finally, the camera passes traffic signage and arrow markers, trailing the distant white umbrella through a thinning crowd toward neon billboards and a far-off arch bridge.
